nasb.text: The coastlands have seen and are afraid; The ends of the earth tremble; They have drawn near and have come.

esv.text: The coastlands have seen and are afraid; the ends of the earth tremble; they have drawn near and come.

cnv.text: 眾海島看見了，就都懼怕； 地極也都戰兢； 他們都近前來。

ccb.text: “众海岛看见我的作为就害怕， 地极也颤抖， 他们都上前来，

csbs.text: 众海岛看见就害怕， 地极也战兢； 它们都聚集前来。
